CDC Health Alert Network

21 Jun 2026 18:37 UTC
Institution Profile
US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention emergency broadcast system. Issues Health Alert Network (HAN) advisories for public health threats including international humanitarian health crises.
Methodology
This profile is produced by the FORGE OSINT engine from 0 open-source signals, spanning 2026-04-25 to 2026-05-01. All source material is publicly available. Inclusion in this directory reflects relevance to published investigations and does not constitute a legal finding.
